events.title: Parallel Existence
events.subtitle: Knew of Existence
events.description: We are from different hometowns, but you occasionally visited my hometown to see your uncle's house. Knowing of each other's existence since we were small, we never made conversation back then.

events.title: The Growth Years
events.subtitle: Different Colleges
events.description: Life took us to completely different colleges and paths. You discovered your love for Biotechnology, while I focused on engineering. Distance and time kept our paths silent.

events.title: The Instagram Connection
events.subtitle: Request & First Message
events.description: The silence broke when I sent an Instagram request. After accepting, you messaged first asking: 'Is this connection sent by you?' and our conversation began.

events.title: One Month of Conversations
events.subtitle: Comfort in Chats
events.description: Thirty days of constant connection. Finding comfort in your childish behavior, calmness, and understanding. You became my daily dose of peace.

events.title: Your Birthday
events.subtitle: Celebrating Priyadharshika
events.description: Wishing you the happiest birthday as you turn 21, ready to take on the world of M.Sc Biotechnology. This digital capsule is for you.
